# Repository artifacts generated by the "Elite Generalist" framework brief.

## Files
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `README.md` | Framework summary (six pillars + quickstart) |
| `ParserCombinator.hs` | Zero-dependency Haskell prototype (Pillars 2 & 3) |
| `architecture-diagram.mmd` | Mermaid source for the architecture diagram |
| `architecture-diagram.png` | Rendered diagram (2194×2928, transparent) |

## How to push to GitHub

From a machine with GitHub access:

```bash
# 1. Create an empty repo on GitHub (no README, no .gitignore)
#    https://github.com/new  → name it e.g. elite-generalist-framework

# 2. Add the remote and push
git remote add origin git@github.com:<your-user>/elite-generalist-framework.git
git push -u origin main
```

If you prefer HTTPS:

```bash
git remote add origin https://github.com/<your-user>/elite-generalist-framework.git
git push -u origin main
```
